      {
        "id": "Class:Organization",
        "label": "Organization",
        "description": "An organization entity with type, contact information, and hierarchical affiliation.",
        "source_tables": [
          "organizations"
        ],
        "identifier_columns": [
          "organizations.OrgID"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "Class:Address",
        "label": "Address",
        "description": "A structured address value object bundling location, postcode, and country.",
        "source_tables": [
          "organizations"
        ],
        "identifier_columns": []
      }
    ],
    "data_properties": [
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasOrganizationType",
        "label": "has organization type",
        "domain": "Class:Organization",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "The type or category of the organization."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasOrganizationName",
        "label": "has organization name",
        "domain": "Class:Organization",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "The name of the organization."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasOrganizationURI",
        "label": "has organization URI",
        "domain": "Class:Organization",
        "datatype": "xsd:anyURI",
        "description": "A URI identifier or reference for the organization."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasOrganizationHomepage",
        "label": "has organization homepage",
        "domain": "Class:Organization",
        "datatype": "xsd:anyURI",
        "description": "The homepage URL of the organization."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasAddressStreet",
        "label": "has address street",
        "domain": "Class:Address",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "The street address."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasAddressLocation",
        "label": "has address location",
        "domain": "Class:Address",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "The city or locality."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasAddressPostcode",
        "label": "has address postcode",
        "domain": "Class:Address",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "The postal code."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasAddressCountry",
        "label": "has address country",
        "domain": "Class:Address",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "The country."
      }
    ],
    "object_properties": [
      {
        "id": "ObjectProperty:hasAddress",
        "label": "has address",
        "domain": "Class:Organization",
        "range": "Class:Address",
        "description": "Links an organization to its address information."
      },
      {
        "id": "ObjectProperty:belongsToOrganization",

        "range": "Class:Organization",
        "description": "Indicates hierarchical affiliation of one organization to another."
